text.title: Code: GUS25. Now - 6/30
text.description: Take 25% off orders of $65+ at Gus’s. Up to $30 off.

text.title: On eligible orders. 15% service fee applies ($5.49 min). Terms apply.

custom.value: As you shop for groceries, we want to make sure you enjoy fantastic savings along the way. For orders above $35, enjoy $0 delivery fee and a service fee of minimum $5.49, maximum $7.99.

Fees (including service fee for orders under $35), taxes, and gratuity still apply. All deliveries are subject to availability. Must have or create a valid DoorDash account with a valid form of accepted payment on file. No cash value. Non-transferable. See full terms and conditions at help.doordash.com/consumers/s/article/offer-terms-conditions.
Enjoy $0 delivery fee on orders $12+ and no DoorDash fees on $35+ orders.

click.data: {"close_action":{"label":"Got it","uri":""},"description":["Prices for items shown on this page exclude taxes, fees and tip.","Each store page on DoorDash displays pricing and fee information for that merchant. Go to the store page to view this pricing and fees information.","For some merchants, prices are higher than in-store prices. Some merchants aim to match in-store prices. And other merchants may have unique pricing policies, such as to reflect benefits for wholesale club members. Where pickup is available, prices for delivery and pick-up may vary.","In-store promotions may not apply.","Delivery fees, service fees, and small order fees may apply. All of these fees go to DoorDash and help cover the costs of operating the DoorDash platform.","Other fees such as bag fees, bottle fees, and fees in response to local regulations may apply. Some of these fees may be retained by DoorDash.","You will see all of the fees that apply to your order at checkout prior to completing the transaction."],"title":"Pricing and Fees","type":"retail_disclaimer_component_schema_v1"}
